Parameter.Description: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: New MetaDocs workspace to create.
Parameter.Name: new-workspace

Parameter.Description: Stable documentation subject id.
Parameter.Name: id

Parameter.Description: Page title and subject display name.
Parameter.Name: title

Parameter.Description: Short subject summary.
Parameter.Name: summary

Parameter.Description: Authored narrative body.
Parameter.Name: body

Parameter.Description: Optional subject kind. Default: Guide.
Parameter.Name: kind

Parameter.Description: Optional display path. Default: title.
Parameter.Name: path

Parameter.Description: Optional parent subject id.
Parameter.Name: parent

Parameter.Description: Optional narrative slot. Default: Summary.
Parameter.Name: slot

Parameter.Description: Optional authored documentation source id.
Parameter.Name: source-id

Parameter.Description: Optional authored documentation source display name.
Parameter.Name: source-name

Parameter.Description: Source MetaCli workspace to document.
Parameter.Name: source-workspace

Parameter.Description: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: New MetaDocs workspace to create.
Parameter.Name: new-workspace

Parameter.Description: Optional MetaCli application id when the source workspace contains more than one application.
Parameter.Name: application

Parameter.Description: Optional rendered group name, for example meta-bi.
Parameter.Name: group

Parameter.Description: Optional stable documentation source id.
Parameter.Name: source-id

Parameter.Description: Existing MetaDocs workspace that already contains imported CLI subjects.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: Markdown file or directory to scan for command prose.
Parameter.Name: source-root

Parameter.Description: Optional stable documentation source id for imported markdown prose.
Parameter.Name: source-id

Parameter.Description: Source Meta workspace whose model should be documented.
Parameter.Name: source-workspace

Parameter.Description: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: New MetaDocs workspace to create.
Parameter.Name: new-workspace

Parameter.Description: Optional stable documentation source id.
Parameter.Name: source-id

Parameter.Description: Optional source display name.
Parameter.Name: display-name

Parameter.Description: Source Meta workspace whose allowed instances should be documented.
Parameter.Name: source-workspace

Parameter.Description: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: Optional stable documentation source id for imported instance docs.
Parameter.Name: source-id

Parameter.Description: Optional source id used by import-workspace-model, for linking instance docs to model docs.
Parameter.Name: model-source-id

Parameter.Description: Optional source display name.
Parameter.Name: display-name

Parameter.Description: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: Source workspace entity name to include.
Parameter.Name: entity

Parameter.Description: Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.
Parameter.Name: source-id

Parameter.Description: Optional property used only as the imported instance display name.
Parameter.Name: display-name-property

Parameter.Description: Optional property used only as the imported instance summary.
Parameter.Name: summary-property

Parameter.Description: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: Source workspace entity name.
Parameter.Name: entity

Parameter.Description: Property name to import as a generated fact.
Parameter.Name: property

Parameter.Description: Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.
Parameter.Name: source-id

Parameter.Description: Existing MetaDocs workspace to update in place.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: Source workspace entity name.
Parameter.Name: entity

Parameter.Description: Relationship selector, navigation name, or relationship column name.
Parameter.Name: relationship

Parameter.Description: Optional model documentation source id this policy applies to. Omit for a global policy.
Parameter.Name: source-id

Parameter.Description: MetaDocs workspace to include. Repeat for many workspaces.
Parameter.Name: include

Parameter.Description: Suite workspace to write.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: MetaDocs workspace to validate.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: Treat warnings as failing diagnostics.
Parameter.Name: warnings-as-errors

Parameter.Description: Include prose authoring diagnostics.
Parameter.Name: include-prose-diagnostics

Parameter.Description: MetaDocs workspace to render.
Parameter.Name: workspace

Parameter.Description: Output directory. The merged page is written as docs.html.
Parameter.Name: out
